pkgmetadata.longdescription:
We present a parser for the world famous Billboard dataset containing the chord transcriptions of over 1000 professional chord transcriptions of popular music randomly selected from /Billboard/ magazine's ``Hot 100'' chart between 1958 and 1991, all time-aligned with audio.
See: W. Bas de Haas and John Ashley Burgoyne, /Parsing the Billboard Chord Transcriptions/, Technical Report UU-CS-2012-018, Department of Information and Computing Sciences, Utrecht University, 2012. (<http://www.cs.uu.nl/research/techreps/repo/CS-2012/2012-018.pdf>)
And: John Ashley Burgoyne, Jonathan Wild, Ichiro Fujinaga, /An Expert Ground-Truth Set for Audio Chord Recognition and Music Analysis/, In: Proceedings of International Conference on Music Information Retrieval, 2011. (<http://ismir2011.ismir.net/papers/OS8-1.pdf>)
